Root cause found: Electron 42 regression on KDE Wayland (Bazzite) — no window is ever composited under the native Wayland backend, and under forced x11 the GPU process crash-loops and no X11 windows are created. Verified with a minimal red-window repro script: invisible on 42, visible on 33. Fixed by pinning Electron back to ^33 (runs via XWayland; windows, positioning, and cursor queries all work). Verified popup visibly on screen via screenshot.

Popup refresh verified live on the host: clip count updated from stale 19 to 30 on show, marker string captured post-startup appears in DB and list. Clear History wired via clips:clear IPC + native dialog; clearAllClips covered by unit tests (84 passing).

Implemented via AT-SPI with dbus-next. Verified on host: popup maps 12px below Konsole's live caret with Qt Wayland origin fix-up. Chromium apps emit after next launch (toolkit-accessibility enabled). Falls back to mouse placement whenever the caret is unknown or untrustworthy.
